personal.title: PulseBoard
personal.subtitle: Monitoring & Observability Platform
personal.description: An open-source mobile observability platform featuring crash analytics, real-time WebSocket event streaming, AI-powered insights via Anthropic/OpenAI/Google/Moonshot, and a React Native SDK. Self-hostable backend on Railway, web dashboard on Vercel.

personal.title: KMIH 88.9 Radio
personal.subtitle: Student Operated Radio Station
personal.description: A student-operated radio station at Mercer Island High School, featuring a web application developed with Bolt.new and an iOS-exclusive mobile app built using React Native.

personal.title: Loan Manager v2.0
personal.subtitle: Informal Loan Management Platform
personal.description: Loan Manager, a mobile-first product focused on bringing structure and reliability to informal personal lending. Millions of people lend and borrow money within their personal networks without proper tracking, instalment visibility, or accountability systems. Over time, this lack of structure creates missed repayments, unclear expectations, and strained relationships.

professional.title: Fundix.pro
professional.subtitle: Prop Trading Application
professional.description: I led the architecture of the application using React Native alongside a small engineering team, establishing the foundational codebase structure, implementing complex business logic, and integrating third-party services. I managed two developers—mentoring a junior engineer to mid-level and oversaw performance optimization, scalability, and overall code quality.
contribution: Build the initial documentation for system design.
Implemented the core architecture and established the foundational structure of the mobile application.
Managed the organization of the codebase by applying principles like SOLID, DRY, OOP, and the KISS pattern.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines for linting, unit test coverage checks, and documentation validation.
Implemented CI/CD for end-to-end testing using GitHub Actions and BrowserStack to fulfill business requirements.
Managed performance through profiling, bundle analysis, and applied optimizations such as lazy loading and code splitting.
Utilized AI agents to enhance productivity for both the team and myself.
Collaborated cross-functionally with the backend team to define and maintain API contracts.
Collaborated with UI/UX designers to ensure smooth design handoffs and accurate implementation.
Mentored both junior and senior developers through complex decisions and technical challenges.
Managed internal testing processes and post-production release workflows.
Developed a generic internal library on npmjs to support all company applications by isolating reusable components and design attributes.
Developed automated pipelines connecting the backend to Directus CMS and the mobile application, ensuring that backend updates automatically propagate to the frontend.
professional.status_reason: The company was dissolved due to unknown reasons but work that was done is mentioned below along with screenshots.

professional.title: Yoka
professional.subtitle: Real-time Asset Duel Trading Platform
professional.description: Yoka was a real-time asset dueling platform where users selected financial assets such as Tesla, Microsoft, or Google and competed against other assets based on market price movement. Users placed stakes using USDT or Yokens (an in-app virtual currency) and selected duel durations of 5, 10, 15, or 30 minutes. Outcomes were determined by market profit or loss during the selected timeframe. The platform was delivered as both a Telegram Mini App built with Next.js and a mobile application built with React Native, enabling users to deposit funds via multiple wallets and participate in live duels.
contribution: Led the mobile engineering effort and established the overall architecture and technical foundation of the React Native application.
Designed the system architecture and collaborated with backend teams to define scalable API contracts and real-time data flows.
Delivered the first production-ready version of the application within a 3-month timeline.
Implemented real-time communication using WebSockets to handle live asset duels and instant result updates.
Integrated wallet-based deposit mechanisms enabling users to fund their accounts with USDT and participate in duels.
Established state management and data-fetching strategies using Zustand and React Query for predictable and performant application behavior.
Implemented monitoring and observability using Sentry, MixPanel, Firebase Analytics, and Looker Studio.
Set up CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Fastlane to automate builds, testing, and release processes.
Collaborated with product, design, and backend teams to iterate on features and optimize the application after launch.
professional.status_reason: The company was dissolved due to unknown reasons but work that was done is mentioned below along with screenshots.
